parallel-safe.description: Can be implemented in parallel with sibling issues

issues.title: Add account settings baseline flow
issues.what_to_build: Add the smallest end-to-end account settings path that can be verified independently.
acceptance_criteria: A signed-in user can view the account settings route.
The route loads existing account data from the backend.
The slice includes regression coverage for the happy path.
coordination_risks: May touch shared settings navigation; coordinate final merge order.
user_stories: As a signed-in user, I can open account settings and see my current details.

issues.title: Add notification preference editing
issues.what_to_build: Add an end-to-end notification preference edit flow that can ship independently of other settings slices.
acceptance_criteria: A signed-in user can update notification preferences.
Preference changes persist through the backend.
The slice includes regression coverage for saving preferences.
coordination_risks: May share settings test fixtures; avoid fixed ports or global mutable fixtures.
user_stories: As a signed-in user, I can choose which notifications I receive.

issues.title: Record audit events for settings changes
issues.what_to_build: Record a minimal audit event when account or notification settings change.
acceptance_criteria: Account settings changes emit an audit event.
Notification preference changes emit an audit event.
Tests verify audit event payload shape for both flows.
coordination_risks: Depends on the completed event shapes from both Wave 0 slices.
user_stories: As an operator, I can trace important settings changes.
